front.title: MoFRR Path Liveness for Network Failures

abstract.t: This document discusses an operational gap in Multicast-Only Fast Reroute when failures occur inside an upstream multicast path but do not cause a visible RIB or RPF change at the merge point. The document motivates the need for a scalable path-liveness mechanism that can detect such hidden multicast delivery failures without requiring expensive per-flow packet monitoring.
